## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Start the server with `npm run dev`
2. Send a request to `...`
3. Observe error `...`

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, stack traces, or log output.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Node.js | e.g. 24.0.0 |
| npm | e.g. 10.x |
| Branch | e.g. master |

## Logs

```
Paste relevant pino log output here (remove any secrets first)
```

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem — screenshots, curl commands, etc.
